description_long: This is a single-story bungalow surrounded by a wooden fence and a well-maintained yard with several large, leafy trees. The structure features a flat roof and a mix of exterior wall finishes, including brick and painted surfaces, with multiple windows and doors visible on all sides. The front facade displays a series of entry doors, each with its own small stoop, suggesting multiple units or entrances. The backyard area is open and grassy, bordered by the fence and shaded by trees, providing a private outdoor space. The windows are arranged in a mostly linear pattern, with some grouped together and others spaced apart, contributing to an asymmetrical yet balanced appearance. The overall design is modern and functional, with clear separation between indoor and outdoor spaces.
description: A modern, single-story bungalow with a flat roof, multiple entry doors, and a fenced yard with trees and grassy areas.
description_view_0: Front view showing multiple entry doors, windows, and a grassy yard with two large trees and a driveway.
description_view_1: Rear view highlighting the backyard, additional windows, and the wooden fence enclosing the property.
description_view_2: Side view displaying the length of the bungalow, grouped windows, and the arrangement of trees along the fence.
description_view_3: Opposite side view with a clear look at the backyard, fence, and the distribution of windows and doors.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical with grouped and spaced windows
